FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Geopolitical Tensions Drive Safe-Haven Flows as BOJ Policy Divergence Persists
tldr_points: Middle East escalation fuels safe-haven demand for JPY
BOJ dovish stance contrasts with Fed hawkish hold
Technical setup favors long positions on pullbacks
FX.excerpt: Geopolitical risk premium supports JPY longs; BOJ policy divergence remains structural tailwind for USD/JPY
FX.comment: Geopolitical risk and policy divergence support bullish thesis; enter on MA20 pullback

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish

STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 bullish as Dow hits 50K; tech leadership drives momentum higher
STOCKS.comment: Bullish trend intact; buy dips toward MA20 support

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Senate Crypto Bill Advancement Fuels Technical Dip-Buying Opportunity

CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD bullish bias as Senate advances crypto bill; technical dip at MA20 offers entry with tight stop.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC/USD bullish bias as Senate advances crypto bill; technical dip at MA20 offers entry with tight stop.
